teamChat.chooseConvDesc: Select a team member or open Team Chat
teamChat.sendToTeam: Send message to the entire team

hero.title: Know which customers are about to leave — before it's too late.
hero.desc: Risk scores, automated priorities, and tasks for your team in one place.

about.title: Retention data your CS team can trust.
about.desc: Visions helps Customer Success teams see who is at risk of churn and what needs to be done — without long spreadsheets or ad hoc weekly meetings.
about.point3: Admin & staff roles in one single flow

workflow.title: How Visions Works
workflow.desc: Automated 4-step process to detect churn risk and perform retention quickly.

step1.title: Connect & Sync
step1.desc: Instantly connect transaction data, app usage, CS tickets, and customer satisfaction surveys.

step2.title: AI Risk Analysis
step2.desc: The ChurnShield AI engine predicts churn risk scores per customer (0-100%) with state-of-the-art ML models.

step3.title: Priority & Tasks
step3.desc: High-risk customers are automatically sorted and distributed evenly to your CS/staff team.

step4.title: Actionable Guides
step4.desc: CS staff receive personalized action recommendations to contact customers and save their contracts.

workspace.title: One Platform, Two Workspaces
workspace.desc: Visions separates responsibilities for focused team operations. Admins manage strategies & AI models, while Staff execute customer retention.
workspace.adminDesc: As an administrator, you have complete visibility into organizational retention performance and can perform regular AI optimization.
workspace.adminPoint1: Monitor churn rate & total customer statistics summary.
workspace.adminPoint2: Run automated retention processes to match assignments.
workspace.adminPoint3: Upload new data batches to retrain AI model accuracy.
workspace.adminPoint4: Distribute staff workload evenly or manually.
workspace.staffDesc: As Customer Success staff, your workspace is clean and distraction-free so you can immediately prioritize customers who need the most help.
workspace.staffPoint1: View an exclusive list of customers assigned to you.
workspace.staffPoint2: Analyze contributing churn risk factors (NPS, complaint tickets, etc.).

mock.rec1: Send contract renewal offer email with special discount.
mock.rec2: Call via phone since there are 3 active technical support tickets.

features.title: Features for retention-focused teams
features.desc: From risk scores to reports — built for CS daily operations.

item1.title: Risk score per customer
item1.desc: Scores 0–100 based on usage patterns, tickets, and NPS to clarify team priorities.

item2.title: Automated priority
item2.desc: High-risk customer queues are automatically sorted so nothing falls through cracks.

item3.title: Concrete recommendations
item3.desc: Actionable next steps per customer so staff never start from scratch.

item4.title: Distribution to staff
item4.desc: Assign to team members evenly or manually according to your policy.

item5.title: Retention reports
item5.desc: Summary of retention, churn, and team performance for meetings or reporting.

item6.title: Two roles, one platform
item6.desc: Admins see the macro picture; staff focus on their assigned customers.

benefits.title: Real benefits for CS operations
benefits.point2: Assign customers to the CS team

cta.title: Ready to start with your team?
cta.desc: Request access from your organization admin, then log in to the dashboard.
